# Cannabis Mythen & Evidenz

> Evidenzbasierte Informationen zu Cannabis-Mythen — eine wissenschaftliche Faktencheck-Plattform auf Basis der CaRM-Studie.

## About

This website presents evidence-based information about common cannabis myths in German. It classifies 42 myths using scientific research data from the CaRM (Cannabis: Realities and Myths) study. The platform targets multiple audiences: adults (18–70), minors (16–17), consumers, young adults (18–26), and parents.

## Sections

- [Zahlen & Fakten](/zahlen-und-fakten/): 36 factsheets covering 42 cannabis myths with scientific classifications
- [Häufige Fragen](/haeufige-fragen/): Frequently asked questions about cannabis, grouped by health themes
- [Selbsttest](/selbsttest/): Interactive quizzes testing cannabis knowledge across 4 themes (Alltag, Körper, Psyche, Gesellschaft)
- [Über uns](/ueber-uns/): Project information, team, methodology, and classification system

## Technology

Built with Astro 6, React 18, Keystatic CMS, Markdoc, D3.js, ECharts, and deployed on Netlify.

## Content Structure

Content is managed via Keystatic CMS with 8 collections:
- **zahlenUndFakten**: Core factsheets (myth ID m01–m42) with classifications: richtig, eher richtig, eher falsch, falsch, keine Aussage möglich
- **haeufigeFragen**: FAQ entries grouped by theme with audience targeting
- **selbsttest**: Quiz modules with structured questions, scoring tiers, and factsheet recommendations
- **startseite**: Scrollytelling narratives with step-based visualizations
- **ueberUns**: About pages (team, methodology, classification, project)
- **zahlenUndFaktenDashboard**: Audience-segmented dashboard indicator data
- **meta**: Internal reference documents
- **changelog**: Project activity log

## Data

Research data from the CaRM study is available at `/data/carm-data.json`.

## Source

- Repository: https://github.com/fshankov/cannabismythen
